caribbean.headline: Moderate Winds and Elevated Seas Impact Bimini Today
caribbean.paragraph: Bimini is experiencing sustained winds up to 27 knots with wave heights reaching 7.3 feet and a dominant NNW swell period of 8 seconds. Rain chances remain moderate at 31 percent, while Grand Cayman sees lighter winds near 19 knots with less marine impact.

mediterranean.headline: Heavy Rain and Elevated Seas Impact Lisbon Today
mediterranean.paragraph: Lisbon is experiencing heavy rainfall with a 100% chance of precipitation accompanied by west-southwest swells producing significant wave heights of 7.2 feet. Winds remain moderate at 16 knots, creating challenging conditions for marine operations in the western Mediterranean.
